_description: RocketReach Person Search API (POST https://api.rocketreach.co/api/v2/person/search) query parameter specification. Use this schema to map AutoSourcing.html form fields into a valid RocketReach search payload. The request body must wrap all filters in a 'query' key: { 'query': { ... }, 'start': 1, 'page_size': 10 }.

request_wrapper.query: object — all filter parameters go inside this key
request_wrapper.page_size: integer — number of results to return per page (max 25)

name.description: Full or partial name of the person to search for.
name.source_field: keywords (if it looks like a person name)

current_title.description: Job titles currently held by the people you want to find. A person is included if they match any ONE of the supplied titles.

current_employer.description: Current employer / company names. A person is included if their current employer matches any of these names.

location.description: Locations where people live or work. Accepts city names, country names, or region names.

keyword.description: Free-text keyword string. Searches across name, title, company, skills, and bio fields.

skills.description: Skills or technologies the person should have. Infer from job titles or keywords when appropriate.

degree.description: Education degree filter. Only include when explicitly searching for education background.

major.description: Field of study / academic major. Only include when explicitly searching for education background.

school.description: University or institution name. Only include when explicitly searching for alumni.

past_employer.description: Past employer names. Only include when explicitly looking for alumni of specific companies.

profiles.description: List of matching person profiles (also check 'people' and 'results' keys for alternate response formats)

item_fields.id: RocketReach internal person ID — store as _rocketreach_id for lookup calls
item_fields.name: Full name (fallback when first_name/last_name absent)
item_fields.linkedin_url: LinkedIn profile URL — use as the primary link

response_fields.pagination.total: Estimated total number of matching profiles
